creator: puga@mauibuilt.com
text:
This is all I get from the debugger

mauibuilt /usr/src/sys/i386/compile/MAUIBUILT 181% kgdb kernel.debug
/var/crash/vmcore.1
[GDB will not be able to debug user-mode threads:

This GDB was configured as "i386-marcel-freebsd".
Cannot access memory at address 0xc7b4
(kgdb)


all 3 core dumps have the same memory error.. the machine has never
showed signs of memory problems or rebooots other than  the usb problem,
neither have 5 other machine that have had the problem.

I posted a link to the core dumps which ae still avalible online in case
I did somthing wrong.

Please inform me of what I have to do in order to complete this.

Thank you

Richard Puga
